questions.question: Q1. Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word.
questions.explanation: ‘Abandon’ matlab hamesha ke liye chhod dena. Iska ulta (Antonym) hoga 'Keep' yaani paas rakhna.

questions.question: Q2. BENEVOLENT (SSC CHSL 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Benevolent’ matlab paropkari ya dayalu. 'Malevolent' matlab doosron ka bura chahne wala.

questions.question: Q3. CANDID (SSC MTS 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Candid’ matlab jo saaf-saaf sach bol de. Iska ulta hoga 'Deceptive' yaani dhokhebaj ya jo baatein chhupaye.

questions.question: Q4. DORMANT (SSC CPO 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Dormant’ matlab jo abhi nishkriya ho (soya hua). Iska ulta hoga 'Active' (sakriya).

questions.question: Q5. EXUBERANT (SSC CGL 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Exuberant’ matlab joshila aur khush. Iska ulta hoga 'Gloomy' yaani udaas ya niraash.

questions.question: Q6. FRUGAL (SSC CHSL 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Frugal’ matlab kifayati (kam kharch karne wala). Iska ulta hoga 'Extravagant' (fizool-kharch).

questions.question: Q7. GULLIBLE (SSC MTS 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Gullible’ matlab jo aasani se sab par vishwas kar le. Iska ulta hoga 'Cynical' jo har kisi par shak kare.

questions.question: Q8. HAUGHTY (SSC CPO 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Haughty’ matlab ghamandi. Iska ulta hoga 'Humble' (vinamra).

questions.question: Q9. IMMUTABLE (SSC CGL 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Immutable’ matlab jise badla na ja sake. Iska ulta hoga 'Variable' (badalne wala).

questions.question: Q10. JADED (SSC CHSL 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Jaded’ matlab thaka hua ya uba hua. Iska ulta hoga 'Refreshed' (taza-dam).

questions.question: Q11. KNAVE (SSC MTS 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Knave’ matlab dhokhebaj aadmi. Iska ulta hoga 'Hero' ya koi saccha/adarsh vyakti.

questions.question: Q12. LETHARGIC (SSC CPO 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Lethargic’ matlab aalsi ya sust. Iska ulta hoga 'Vivacious' (josh aur urja se bhara).

questions.question: Q13. MITIGATE (SSC CGL 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Mitigate’ matlab dard ya pareshani kam karna. Iska ulta hoga 'Aggravate' yaani sthiti ko aur bigad dena.

questions.question: Q14. NOVICE (SSC CHSL 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Novice’ matlab kisi kaam mein naya vyakti. Iska ulta hoga 'Expert' ya 'Veteran'.

questions.question: Q15. OBSCURE (SSC MTS 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Obscure’ matlab aspasht ya dhundhla. Iska ulta hoga 'Clear' (saaf).

questions.question: Q16. PRUDENT (SSC CPO 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Prudent’ matlab samajhdar. Iska ulta hoga 'Reckless' (bina soche kaam karne wala).

questions.question: Q17. QUASH (SSC CGL 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Quash’ matlab radd kar dena. Iska ulta hoga 'Validate' yaani kanooni taur par manya karna.

questions.question: Q18. RELUCTANT (SSC CHSL 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Reluctant’ matlab an-ichhuk. Iska ulta hoga 'Eager' (utsuk/ready).

questions.question: Q19. SCANTY (SSC MTS 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Scanty’ matlab bahut kam. Iska ulta hoga 'Abundant' (bahut zyada/prachur).

questions.question: Q20. TRANQUIL (SSC CPO 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Tranquil’ matlab shant. Iska ulta hoga 'Disturbed' (ashant).

questions.question: Q21. URGE (SSC CGL 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Urge’ matlab prarit karna. Iska ulta hoga 'Discourage' (hatotsahit karna).

questions.question: Q22. VIGILANT (SSC CHSL 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Vigilant’ matlab savdhan. Iska ulta hoga 'Negligent' (laparvah).

questions.question: Q23. WRATH (SSC MTS 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Wrath’ matlab bahut gussa. Iska ulta hoga 'Delight' (khushi/anand).

questions.question: Q24. ZEAL (SSC CPO 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Zeal’ matlab josh. Iska ulta hoga 'Apathy' (udaseenta/no interest).

questions.question: Q25. ABSTAIN (SSC CGL 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Abstain’ matlab door rehna. Iska ulta hoga 'Indulge' (shamil hona ya maze lena).

questions.question: Q26. BRISK (SSC CHSL 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Brisk’ matlab tez. Iska ulta hoga 'Sluggish' (bahut dheema ya sust).

questions.question: Q27. COGENT (SSC MTS 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Cogent’ matlab thos ya prabhavshali. Iska ulta hoga 'Weak' (kamzor).

questions.question: Q28. DEBACLE (SSC CPO 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Debacle’ matlab badi nakami. Iska ulta hoga 'Success' (safalta).

questions.question: Q29. ERRATIC (SSC CGL 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Erratic’ matlab aniyamit. Iska ulta hoga 'Constant' (sthir/regular).

questions.question: Q30. FLABBERGASTED (SSC CHSL 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Flabbergasted’ matlab chakit reh jana. Iska ulta hoga 'Unmoved' (jis par koi asar na ho).

questions.question: Q31. HAMPER (SSC MTS 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Hamper’ matlab badha dalna. Iska ulta hoga 'Facilitate' (kaam ko asan banana).

questions.question: Q32. IMPETUOUS (SSC CPO 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Impetuous’ matlab jaldbaaz. Iska ulta hoga 'Cautious' (savdhan).

questions.question: Q33. LUMINOUS (SSC CGL 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Luminous’ matlab chamakdar. Iska ulta hoga 'Dim' (dhundhla/kam roshni).

questions.question: Q34. MALICE (SSC CHSL 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Malice’ matlab durbhavna. Iska ulta hoga 'Goodwill' (shubh-kaamna).

questions.question: Q35. NEFARIOUS (SSC MTS 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Nefarious’ matlab dusht. Iska ulta hoga 'Virtuous' (gunvaan/nek).

questions.question: Q36. ONEROUS (SSC CPO 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Onerous’ matlab bahut bhari/mushkil. Iska ulta hoga 'Effortless' (bina mehnat ke).

questions.question: Q37. PLACATE (SSC CGL 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Placate’ matlab shant karna. Iska ulta hoga 'Enrage' (gussa dilana).

questions.question: Q38. QUIVER (SSC CHSL 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Quiver’ matlab thartharana. Iska ulta hoga 'Still' (sthir rehna).

questions.question: Q39. RUTHLESS (SSC MTS 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Ruthless’ matlab nirdai. Iska ulta hoga 'Compassionate' (dayalu).

questions.question: Q40. TACTFUL (SSC CPO 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Tactful’ matlab vyavhaar-kushal. Iska ulta hoga 'Rude' (bad-tameez).

questions.question: Q41. UBIQUITOUS (SSC CGL 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Ubiquitous’ matlab jo sab jagah ho. Iska ulta hoga 'Rare' (durlabh).

questions.question: Q42. VALIANT (SSC CHSL 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Valiant’ matlab bahadur. Iska ulta hoga 'Cowardly' (darpoak).

questions.question: Q43. WARY (SSC MTS 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Wary’ matlab savdhan. Iska ulta hoga 'Reckless' (laparvah).

questions.question: Q44. YIELD (SSC CPO 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Yield’ matlab jhuk jana/har maanna. Iska ulta hoga 'Resist' (virodh karna/date rehna).

questions.question: Q45. ABHOR (SSC CGL 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Abhor’ matlab nafrat karna. Iska ulta hoga 'Adore' (bahut pasand/pyaar karna).

questions.question: Q46. BIZARRE (SSC CHSL 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Bizarre’ matlab ajeeb. Iska ulta hoga 'Ordinary' (sadharan).

questions.question: Q47. COVETOUS (SSC MTS 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Covetous’ matlab laalchi. Iska ulta hoga 'Generous' (udaar).

questions.question: Q48. DEVASTATE (SSC CPO 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Devastate’ matlab tabah karna. Iska ulta hoga 'Construct' (banana).

questions.question: Q49. FRIVOLOUS (SSC CGL 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Frivolous’ matlab gair-gambhir. Iska ulta hoga 'Serious' (gambhir).

questions.question: Q50. GORGEOUS (SSC CHSL 2022)
questions.explanation: ‘Gorgeous’ matlab bahut sundar. Iska ulta hoga 'Ugly' (badsurat).

questions.question: Q51. Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word.
questions.explanation: 'Abridge' matlab chhota karna. 'Amplify' matlab vistaar dena. 'Concatenate' (series mein jodna) confuse kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Q52. CANDID (SSC CPO 2022)
questions.explanation: 'Candid' saaf-saaf bolne wala. 'Evasive' matlab baaton ko ghumane wala. Blunt iska synonym ho jayega.

questions.question: Q53. DOCILE (SSC CHSL 2023 Tier 1)
questions.explanation: 'Docile' matlab jo asani se maan jaye. 'Willful' matlab ziddi ya apni manmani karne wala.

questions.question: Q54. EPHEMERAL (SSC CGL 2023 Tier 1)
questions.explanation: 'Ephemeral' kshnik hota hai. Iska antonym 'Eternal' (anant) hai. Baki teeno synonyms hain.

questions.question: Q55. FASTIDIOUS (SSC MTS 2023)
questions.explanation: 'Fastidious' jise khush karna mushkil ho. 'Easygoing' jo har tarah se adjust kar le.

questions.question: Q56. GREGARIOUS (SSC CPO 2023)
questions.explanation: 'Gregarious' milansar. 'Reclusive' jo akela rehna pasand kare.

questions.question: Q57. IMPETUOUS (SSC CGL 2023 Tier 2)
questions.explanation: 'Impetuous' jaldbaaz. 'Circumspect' matlab jo har kadam phook-phook kar rakhe (Cautious).

questions.question: Q58. LOQUACIOUS (SSC CHSL 2022)
questions.explanation: 'Loquacious' bahut bolne wala. 'Reticent' jo bahut kam bole.

questions.question: Q59. MEAGER (SSC MTS 2022)
questions.explanation: 'Meager' matlab kam. 'Copious' matlab prachur matra mein (Abundant).

questions.question: Q60. NEFARIOUS (SSC CGL 2022)
questions.explanation: 'Nefarious' dusht. 'Exemplary' matlab itna accha ki dusre misaal dein.

questions.question: Q61. OBSCURE (SSC CPO 2022)
questions.explanation: 'Obscure' aspasht. 'Pellucid' matlab crystal clear. (Ye option aksar phansata hai).

questions.question: Q62. PRUDENT (SSC CHSL 2023)
questions.explanation: 'Prudent' samajhdar. Iska seedha antonym 'Imprudent' hai.

questions.question: Q63. QUASH (SSC MTS 2022)
questions.explanation: 'Quash' mita dena/radd karna. 'Engender' kisi cheez ko utpann (start) karna.

questions.question: Q64. RELUCTANT (SSC CGL 2023)
questions.explanation: 'Reluctant' anichhuk. 'Alacritous' josh se bhara hua aur tayyar.

questions.question: Q65. SCANTY (SSC CPO 2023)
questions.explanation: 'Scanty' kam. 'Profuse' bahut zyada matra mein.

questions.question: Q66. TRANSIENT (SSC CHSL 2022)
questions.explanation: 'Transient' thode samay ka. 'Perpetual' hamesha rehne wala.

questions.question: Q67. URGE (SSC MTS 2023)
questions.explanation: 'Urge' uksana. 'Deter' rokna ya hatotsahit karna.

questions.question: Q68. VIGILANT (SSC CGL 2022)
questions.explanation: 'Vigilant' savdhan. 'Heedless' laparwah.

questions.question: Q69. WARY (SSC CHSL 2023)
questions.explanation: 'Wary' matlab savdhan. 'Incautious' laparwah.

questions.question: Q70. ZEAL (SSC CPO 2022)
questions.explanation: 'Zeal' josh. 'Indifference' koi dilchaspi na hona.

questions.question: Q71. ABSTAIN (SSC CGL 2023)
questions.explanation: 'Abstain' door rehna. 'Indulge' kisi cheez mein lipat hona.

questions.question: Q72. BRISK (SSC MTS 2022)
questions.explanation: 'Brisk' tez. 'Languid' sust ya thaka hua.

questions.question: Q73. COGENT (SSC CPO 2023)
questions.explanation: 'Cogent' thos. 'Inconclusive' jiska koi thos natija na nikle.

questions.question: Q74. DEBACLE (SSC CHSL 2022)
questions.explanation: 'Debacle' nakami. 'Triumph' badi jeet.

questions.question: Q75. ERRATIC (SSC CGL 2023)
questions.explanation: 'Erratic' aniyamit. 'Consistent' hamesha ek jaisa.

questions.question: Q76. FLABBERGASTED (SSC MTS 2023)
questions.explanation: 'Flabbergasted' chakit. 'Nonchalant' bilkul sant aur laparwah.

questions.question: Q77. HAMPER (SSC CPO 2022)
questions.explanation: 'Hamper' rokna. 'Expedite' kisi process ko tez kar dena.

questions.question: Q78. JADED (SSC CGL 2022)
questions.explanation: 'Jaded' thaka/uba hua. 'Exuberant' josh se bhara hua.

questions.question: Q79. LUMINOUS (SSC CHSL 2023)
questions.explanation: 'Luminous' chamakdar. 'Tenebrous' andhera ya kala.

questions.question: Q80. MALICE (SSC MTS 2022)
questions.explanation: 'Malice' dvesh. 'Benevolence' dayaluta.

questions.question: Q81. ONEROUS (SSC CPO 2023)
questions.explanation: 'Onerous' mushkil. 'Facile' bahut hi asaan.

questions.question: Q82. PLACATE (SSC CGL 2023)
questions.explanation: 'Placate' shant karna. 'Exasperate' bahut zyada gussa dilana ya chidhana.

questions.question: Q83. RUTHLESS (SSC CHSL 2022)
questions.explanation: 'Ruthless' kroor. 'Magnanimous' bade dil wala ya udaar.

questions.question: Q84. UBIQUITOUS (SSC MTS 2023)
questions.explanation: 'Ubiquitous' jo sab jagah ho. 'Sporadic' jo kabhi-kabhi ya kahin-kahin ho.

questions.question: Q85. VALIANT (SSC CPO 2022)
questions.explanation: 'Valiant' bahadur. 'Poltroon' matlab darpok (Coward ka high-level word).

questions.question: Q86. ABHOR (SSC CGL 2022)
questions.explanation: 'Abhor' nafrat karna. 'Cherish' pyaar se sanjo kar rakhna.

questions.question: Q87. BIZARRE (SSC CHSL 2023)
questions.explanation: 'Bizarre' ajeeb. 'Congruous' jo bilkul sahi aur sateek ho.

questions.question: Q88. COVETOUS (SSC MTS 2022)
questions.explanation: 'Covetous' laalchi. 'Altruistic' jo doosron ki madad kare bina kisi laalch ke.

questions.question: Q89. DEVASTATE (SSC CPO 2023)
questions.explanation: 'Devastate' tabah karna. 'Rehabilitate' punarvas ya dobara thik karna.

questions.question: Q90. FRIVOLOUS (SSC CGL 2023)
questions.explanation: 'Frivolous' halki baatein. 'Solemn' gambhir ya gambhirata se bhara.

questions.question: Q91. GORGEOUS (SSC CHSL 2022)
questions.explanation: 'Gorgeous' sundar. 'Repulsive' ghinona ya door bhagane wala.

questions.question: Q92. HAZARDOUS (SSC MTS 2023)
questions.explanation: 'Hazardous' khatarnak. 'Salubrious' swasthya ke liye accha (Safe/Healthy).

questions.question: Q93. INNOCUOUS (SSC CPO 2022)
questions.explanation: 'Innocuous' jo nuksan na kare. 'Deleterious' bahut nuksan-deh.

questions.question: Q94. LETHAL (SSC CGL 2022)
questions.explanation: 'Lethal' maut dene wala. 'Vitalizing' jaan bhar dene wala.

questions.question: Q95. NIMBLE (SSC CHSL 2023)
questions.explanation: 'Nimble' phurtila. 'Ponderous' bhari aur dheema.

questions.question: Q96. OPULENT (SSC MTS 2022)
questions.explanation: 'Opulent' amir. 'Penurious' garibi se bhara ya kanjoos.

questions.question: Q97. PRECARIOUS (SSC CPO 2023)
questions.explanation: 'Precarious' jo gir sakta ho. 'Tenable' jo tik sake ya mazboot ho.

questions.question: Q98. QUIVER (SSC CGL 2023)
questions.explanation: 'Quiver' thartharana (movement). 'Petrified' darr ke maare pathar ho jana (No movement).

questions.question: Q99. RELINQUISH (SSC CHSL 2022)
questions.explanation: 'Relinquish' chhod dena. 'Appropriate' kisi cheez ko apne kabze mein le lena.

questions.question: Q100. TRANSIENT (SSC MTS 2023)
questions.explanation: 'Transient' thode waqt ka. 'Enduring' jo tikka rahe (Long lasting).
